items.title: Poor monsoon and no Cauvery water: distress in Tamil Nadu’s delta region
items.summary: All is not well in the famed ‘Granary of South India’. Between a poor southwest monsoon and lack of water in the Cauvery, crops and farmers are left high and dry. The kuruvai cu...
